details.IncidentDetail: "[12] ^CT737 -- ADVSD CT737-4 GOT PICTURES FOR THE BACKFLOWS AND IS NOW 1098"

"[11] [Notification] [CHP]-^CT737 CB -- ADVSD THERE ARE TWO BACKFLOWS THERE // ONE CT AND THE OTHER UNK WHO IT BELONGS TO POSS CITY // ADVSD THE OTHER BACKFLOW THAT ISN'T CT'S IS POURING A LOT OF WATER"
"[10] ^CT737 CB -- ADVSD CT737-4 DID FIND LEAK TO BACKFLOW // SEALED CT'S BACKFLOW"
"[9] ^CT737 -- ADVSD CT737-4 WAS UTL ON ANY FLOODING OR ISSUES W/ BACKFLOW IN THIS AREA // WILL ADVS 743 CREW TO CHECK THEIR BACKFLOWS ON REG ROUNDS // PLS ADVS IF FURTHER CALLS"
"[8] ^CT737 CB -- ADVSD 737-4 WILL BE ENRT TO CHECK"
"[7] ^1039 CT737, CPZ LOG, ADVSD HE IS OUT OF TOWN, BUT WILL TRY TO GET SOMEONE FROM HIS CREW TO GO OUT // WILL CB TMC TO ADVS"
"[15] ^CURRENT WIND SPEEDS - MT SPRINGS: 22.1 MPH SUSTAINED// 37.1 MPH GUSTS"
